html:
Exclusive to:

Floats are Items exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. Their sole purpose is to be combined with a Sea Fishing Rod to improve the casting range and accuracy of the landing. Most of them can be crafted in the Fishing Filter, requiring a Tackle Receptacle to prototype, while some of them can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in the Bottle Exchange Filter.

The Hardened Rubber Bung Trinket can also be used as a Float, however, it cannot be crafted.

Below is a table of the performance statistics for all Floats.

Float Max Range Range deviation
from casting point 		Angle deviation
from casting point
None 5 30% 40°
7 20% 30°
9 20% 20°
11 20% 20°
13 20% 30°
9 15% 15°
13 5% 5°

Contents

  • 1 Craftable Floats
    • 1.1 Wooden Ball Bobber
    • 1.2 Usage
    • 1.3 Hardened Slip Bobber
    • 1.4 Jet Quill Float
    • 1.5 Crimson Quill Float
    • 1.6 Azure Quill Float
    • 1.7 Saffron Quill Float
    • 1.8 Down Quill Float
    • 1.9 Malbatross Quill Float
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Gallery

Craftable Floats

“Used with a Sea Fishing Rod.”

-

Wooden Ball Bobber

The Wooden Ball Bobber can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Log.

Wickerbottom requires two Wooden Ball Bobbers to craft The Angler's Survival Guide.

Usage

×2

×2

Hardened Slip Bobber

The Hardened Slip Bobber can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Driftwood Piece.

Jet Quill Float

The Jet Quill Float can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Jet Feather. It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle after the player has reached friendship level 3.

Additionally, there is a small chance to find an Advert in Ocean Debris which makes it possible to learn the Jet Quill Float's crafting recipe without access to a Tackle Receptacle.

Crimson Quill Float

The Crimson Quill Float can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Crimson Feather. It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle after the player has reached friendship level 3.

Azure Quill Float

The Azure Quill Float can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Azure Feather. It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle after the player has reached friendship level 3.

Saffron Quill Float

The Saffron Quill Float can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Saffron Feather. It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle after the player has reached friendship level 3.

Down Quill Float

The Down Quill Float can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Down Feather. It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle after the player has reached friendship level 8.

Malbatross Quill Float

The Malbatross Quill Float can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Malbatross Feather. It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle after the player has reached friendship level 8.

Trivia

  • Floats were introduced in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.
  • Before the 2022 March QOL Update, the crafting recipes for the Jet, Crimson, Azure, Saffron, Down, and the Malbatross Quill Float were unlocked by giving their corresponding Adverts to a Tackle Receptacle. Only the Advert for the Jet Quill Float remains in the game.

Gallery

  • Wooden Ball Bobber
  • Hardened Slip Bobber on Water
  • Crimson Quill Float on Water
  • Azure Quill Float on Water
  • Saffron Quill Float on Water
  • Down Quill Float on Water

  • Malbatross Quill Float Used
  • Hardened Rubber Bung Used.
  • An old version of Wooden Ball Bobber found in the game files
  • An old version of Wooden Ball Bobber as item found in the game files

Exclusive to:
Floats are Items exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. Their sole purpose is to be combined with a Sea Fishing Rod to improve the casting range and accuracy of the landing. Most of them can be crafted in the Fishing Filter, requiring a Tackle Receptacle to prototype, while some of them can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in the Bottle Exchange Filter.
The Hardened Rubber Bung Trinket can also be used as a Float, however, it cannot be crafted.

Craftable Floats[edit | edit source]
“Used with a Sea Fishing Rod.”
-
Wooden Ball Bobber[edit | edit source]
Wooden Ball Bobber
"A classic design for pros and beginners."
Object Info
Perk
Increases Sea Fishing Rod casting range and accuracy.
40
Fishing Info
Cast Range 9
Accuracy 0.1
Crafting
×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"oceanfishingbobber_ball"
“The fish will have a ball with this.”
–Wilson, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water?”
–Willow, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“Float well, tiny bobber!”
–Wolfgang, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“It floats happily until something drags it under.”
–Wendy, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“INSTALLING "BOBBER" ADDON TO FISHINGROD.EXE”
–WX-78, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“Nothing like a nice day of fishin'.”
–Woodie, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“How quaint.”
–Maxwell, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“My keen hunter's eyes can detect the smallest nibble!”
–Wigfrid, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“It's a bobbin' bobber!”
–Webber, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“Simple, pas compliqué, parfait!”
–Warly, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“Floaty thing”
–Wormwood, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“Bobber's yer uncle! Ha!”
–Winona, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“I'm just having a ball! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“Bobby floaty!”
–Wurt, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“Just a simple bobber.”
–Walter, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
“It looks like a standard bobber to me.”
–Wanda, examining a Wooden Ball Bobber.
The Wooden Ball Bobber can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 Log.
Wickerbottom requires two Wooden Ball Bobbers to craft The Angler's Survival Guide.

title: Floats
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Clear Mobile Infobox}} '''Floats''' are [[Items]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. Their sole purpose is to be combined with a [[Sea Fishing Rod]] to improve the casting range and accuracy of the landing. Most of them can be crafted in the [[Fishing Filter]], requiring a [[Tackle Receptacle]] to prototype, while some of them can also be acquired by trading with the [[Crabby Hermit]] in the [[Bottle Exchange Filter]]. The [[Hardened Rubber Bung]] Trinket can also be used as a Float, however, it cannot be crafted. from casting point ! scope="col" style="text-align:center"|Angle deviation

Accuracy 0.1 |filter = {{Pic32|Fishing Filter}} |tier = 22 |stack = 40 |perk = Increases [[Sea Fishing Rod]] casting range and accuracy. |spawnCode = "oceanfishingbobber_ball"}} {{Quotes |wilson = The fish will have a ball with this. |willow = How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water? |wolfgang = Float well, tiny bobber! |wendy = It floats happily until something drags it under. |wx78 = INSTALLING "BOBBER" ADDON TO FISHINGROD.EXE |wickerbottom = The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496. |woodie = Nothing like a nice day of fishin'. |maxwell = How quaint. |wigfrid = My keen hunter's eyes can detect the smallest nibble! |webber = It's a bobbin' bobber! |winona = Bobber's yer uncle! Ha! |warly = Simple, pas compliqué, parfait! |wortox = I'm just having a ball! Hyuyu! |wormwood = Floaty thing |wurt = Bobby floaty! |walter = Just a simple bobber. |wanda = It looks like a standard bobber to me. |choose = wolfgang |source = examining a Wooden Ball Bobber. }} The '''Wooden Ball Bobber''' can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 [[Log]]. [[Wickerbottom/Don't Starve Together|Wickerbottom]] requires two Wooden Ball Bobbers to craft [[Books/DST#The Angler's Survival Guide|The Angler's Survival Guide]]. === {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage === {{Recipe |item1 = Wooden Ball Bobber |count1 = 2 |item2 = Papyrus |count2 = 2 |result = The Angler's Survival Guide |character = Wickerbottom}} {{clear}} === Hardened Slip Bobber === {{Object Infobox |cast_range =Cast Range 11
Accuracy 0.1 |name = Hardened Slip Bobber |image = Hardened Slip Bobber Dropped.png |icon = Hardened Slip Bobber.png |description = A more stylish take on the classic bobber. |ingredient1 = Driftwood Piece |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Fishing Filter}} |tier = 22 |stack = 40 |perk = Increases [[Sea Fishing Rod]] casting range and accuracy. |spawnCode = "oceanfishingbobber_oval"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Those fish won't give me the slip this time! |willow = How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water? |wolfgang = Float well, tiny bobber! |wendy = It floats happily until something drags it under. |wx78 = INSTALLING "BOBBER" ADDON TO FISHINGROD.EXE |wickerbottom = The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496. |woodie = Nothing like a nice day of fishin'. |maxwell = It's made of tougher stuff. |wigfrid = My keen hunter's eyes can detect the smallest nibble! |webber = It's a bobbin' bobber! |winona = Bobber's yer uncle! Ha! |warly = This world can harden the best of us, mon ami. |wortox = This doesn't look so hard! |wormwood = Floaty thing |wurt = Bobby floaty! |walter = A slightly less simple bobber. |wanda = A slightly elongated bobber. |choose = maxwell |source = examining a Hardened Slip Bobber. }} The '''Hardened Slip Bobber''' can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 [[Driftwood Piece]]. {{clear}} === Jet Quill Float === {{Object Infobox |image = Jet Quill Float Dropped.png |cast_range =Cast Range 9
Accuracy 0.15 |name = Jet Quill Float |icon = Jet Quill Float.png |description = Favoured by more discerning anglers. |stack = 40 |perk = Increases [[Sea Fishing Rod]] casting range and accuracy. |crafting_infobox = Normal= {{Craft Infobox |ingredient1 = Jet Feather/DST |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Fishing Filter}} |tier = 22 }} |-| Pearl= {{Craft Infobox |ingredient1 = Empty Bottle (DST) |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Bottle Exchange Filter}} |tier_text = {{pic24|Crabby Hermit}} lvl.3 }} |spawnCode = "oceanfishingbobber_crow"}} {{Quotes |wilson = I'd rather eat fish than crow. |willow = How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water? |wolfgang = Feather of crow float well on water! |wendy = It floats happily until something drags it under. |wx78 = INSTALLING "FLOAT" ADDON TO FISHINGROD.EXE |wickerbottom = The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496. |woodie = Hmph. Guess birds are good for some things. |maxwell = I used to see quill floats like this back in England. |wigfrid = Fly straight and true! |webber = We turned a feather into a float! |winona = It's nothin' to crow about, but it ain't half bad! |warly = Feathers are surprisingly useful for fishing! |wortox = Never underestimate the power of a strong quill. |wormwood = Floaty thing |wurt = Feather floaty! |walter = I followed the instructions perfectly. |wanda = I knew I'd find a use for that feather eventually! |choose = wurt |source = examining a Jet Quill Float. }} The '''Jet Quill Float''' can be crafted at a Tackle Receptacle with 1 [[Feather/DST#Jet Feather|Jet Feather]]. It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 [[Empty Bottle/DST|Empty Bottle]] after the player has reached friendship level 3. Additionally, there is a small chance to find an [[Advert]] in [[Ocean Debris]] which makes it possible to learn the Jet Quill Float's crafting recipe without access to a Tackle Receptacle. {{clear}} === Crimson Quill Float === {{Object Infobox |icon = Crimson Quill Float.png |image = Crimson Quill Float Dropped.png |cast_range =Cast Range 9

It can also be acquired by trading with the Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle after the player has reached friendship level 8. {{clear}} == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * Floats were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Hook, Line, and Inker|Hook, Line, and Inker]]'' update. * Before the 2022 March QOL Update, the crafting recipes for the Jet, Crimson, Azure, Saffron, Down, and the Malbatross Quill Float were unlocked by giving their corresponding Adverts to a Tackle Receptacle.
